zakaat.title: Zakaat Assessments
zakaat.subtitle: Calculate and manage annual Zakaat obligations
zakaat.aboutZakaatDesc: Zakaat is one of the Five Pillars of Islam. It is a form of mandatory charity calculated at 2.5% of a Muslim's total savings and wealth above a minimum amount known as nisab. In Saudi Arabia, businesses are required to pay Zakaat on their net assets annually to GAZT (General Authority of Zakat and Tax).

automationTemplates.title: Automation Templates
automationTemplates.subtitle: Pre-built automation recipes to streamline your workflows. Activate with one click.
automationTemplates.activatedDesc: Your automation is now live and running. You can manage it from the Automations page.
automationTemplates.activateHint: You can modify this automation after activation from the Automations page.
automationTemplates.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters to find the templates you need.
automationTemplates.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes or customization details...
automationTemplates.autoAssignLeadsDesc: Automatically route new leads to the right sales rep based on geographic territory.
automationTemplates.autoAssignLeadsFullDesc: This automation instantly assigns incoming leads to the appropriate sales representative based on their configured territory rules. Supports region, country, city, and custom territory definitions. Ensures no lead goes unattended and eliminates manual assignment bottlenecks.
automationTemplates.leadNurtureDesc: Automated email drip campaign that nurtures new leads over 7 days with targeted content.
automationTemplates.leadNurtureFullDesc: Engage new leads with a carefully timed sequence of emails over 7 days. Day 1: Welcome email with value proposition. Day 3: Case study or social proof. Day 7: Follow-up with call-to-action. Includes engagement tracking to identify hot leads and automatically adjust scoring.
automationTemplates.leadScoringUpdateDesc: Dynamically recalculate lead scores based on engagement, demographics, and behavior.
automationTemplates.leadScoringUpdateFullDesc: Automatically recalculates lead scores in real-time whenever a lead performs a tracked activity. Considers email opens, website visits, form submissions, content downloads, and more. When a lead crosses the MQL threshold, it gets automatically promoted and the sales team is notified.
automationTemplates.newLeadNotificationDesc: Instantly notify your team via Slack and email when a new lead comes in.
automationTemplates.newLeadNotificationFullDesc: Never miss a new lead. This automation sends instant notifications to your configured channels (Slack, email, in-app) whenever a new lead is created from any source - web forms, API, imports, or manual entry. Includes lead details and source information for quick context.
automationTemplates.stageChangeNotificationDesc: Alert stakeholders whenever a deal moves to a new pipeline stage.
automationTemplates.stageChangeNotificationFullDesc: Keep your team in sync with real-time notifications when deals progress through your pipeline. Customize which stages trigger notifications and who gets alerted. Includes deal value, owner, and key details in every notification for full context.
automationTemplates.staleDealAlertDesc: Flag deals with no activity for 14 days and alert the deal owner to take action.
automationTemplates.staleDealAlertFullDesc: Prevents deals from falling through the cracks by monitoring activity timestamps. When a deal has had no updates, calls, emails, or tasks for 14 days, the system alerts the deal owner and optionally their manager. A follow-up task is automatically created to re-engage.
automationTemplates.dealWonCelebrationDesc: Celebrate wins by notifying the team and kicking off onboarding when a deal is won.
automationTemplates.dealWonCelebrationFullDesc: When a deal is marked as Won, this automation triggers a team-wide celebration notification, updates the CRM records, and automatically creates an onboarding project with pre-defined tasks. Ensures a smooth handoff from sales to customer success.
automationTemplates.autoFollowupDesc: Automatically create follow-up tasks when a deal changes stage in the pipeline.
automationTemplates.autoFollowupFullDesc: Ensures no deal is left without a next step. Every time a deal moves to a new pipeline stage, a follow-up task is automatically created and assigned to the deal owner. Includes a configurable reminder to keep deals moving forward.
automationTemplates.onboardingChecklistDesc: Generate a customized onboarding checklist when a deal is closed-won.
automationTemplates.onboardingChecklistFullDesc: Streamline your customer onboarding process with auto-generated checklists. When a deal closes, this automation creates a structured onboarding project with tasks, assigns a Customer Success Manager, and sends a welcome email to the new customer with next steps.
automationTemplates.npsSurveyDesc: Send NPS survey 30 days after deal closure to measure customer satisfaction.
automationTemplates.npsSurveyFullDesc: Measure customer satisfaction at the right time. 30 days after a deal closes, an NPS survey is automatically sent to the customer. Based on the response score, the system routes feedback to the appropriate team - promoters to marketing for testimonials, detractors to customer success for intervention.
automationTemplates.renewalReminderDesc: Alert the account manager 60 days before a contract expires to start renewal discussions.
automationTemplates.renewalReminderFullDesc: Never miss a renewal opportunity. This automation scans contract expiration dates daily and alerts the assigned account manager 60 days before expiry. Creates a renewal task with priority and includes contract value, history, and customer health score for informed conversations.
automationTemplates.churnRiskAlertDesc: Detect early churn signals and escalate at-risk accounts to customer success.
automationTemplates.churnRiskAlertFullDesc: Proactively identify customers showing signs of churn. Monitors health score drops, decreased usage, support ticket spikes, and engagement decline. When multiple churn indicators are detected, the system escalates to the CSM and creates a retention plan with recommended actions.
automationTemplates.autoAssignTicketsDesc: Route support tickets to the right agent based on ticket category and expertise.
automationTemplates.autoAssignTicketsFullDesc: Eliminate manual ticket triage by automatically assigning incoming support tickets to the most appropriate agent based on category, skills, and current workload. Supports round-robin, least-busy, and skill-based routing strategies.
automationTemplates.slaEscalationDesc: Automatically escalate tickets approaching or exceeding SLA response and resolution times.
automationTemplates.slaEscalationFullDesc: Protect your SLA commitments with proactive escalation. Monitors ticket age against SLA policies and triggers escalation when response or resolution times are at risk. Warns at 80% of SLA time and escalates to managers at breach. Includes priority override for critical tickets.
automationTemplates.csatSurveyDesc: Send a CSAT survey 1 hour after ticket resolution to collect customer feedback.
automationTemplates.csatSurveyFullDesc: Collect actionable feedback by sending CSAT surveys at the perfect moment - 1 hour after a ticket is resolved. Tracks response rates, identifies trends, and automatically flags low scores for manager review. Helps continuously improve your support quality.
automationTemplates.vipRoutingDesc: Automatically prioritize and route tickets from VIP customers to senior agents.
automationTemplates.vipRoutingFullDesc: Ensure your most valuable customers receive premium support. When a VIP customer submits a ticket, this automation instantly elevates its priority, routes it to your senior support team, and sends a notification to the account manager. Includes customer lifetime value and history for full context.
automationTemplates.onLeadCreated: When a new lead is created
automationTemplates.onWebFormSubmit: When a web form is submitted

automationTemplates.stepCheckThresholdDesc: Verify if the updated score crosses the MQL qualification bar.

automationTemplates.stepCreateTaskDesc: Auto-create a high-priority task to re-engage the stale deal.
automationTemplates.stepDealMarkedWonDesc: Triggers when a deal status changes to Closed Won.
automationTemplates.stepCelebrateTeamDesc: Send a celebration notification to the entire team channel.
automationTemplates.stepUpdateCrmDesc: Automatically update contact status, revenue records, and tags.
automationTemplates.stepCreateOnboardingDesc: Generate a structured onboarding project with tasks and timeline.
automationTemplates.stepCreateFollowupTaskDesc: Generate a task with deadline based on stage requirements.
automationTemplates.stepWait2DaysDesc: Allow time for the deal owner to complete the follow-up.
automationTemplates.stepRemindOwnerDesc: Send a reminder if the follow-up task is not yet completed.
automationTemplates.stepGenerateChecklistDesc: Create a customized onboarding checklist based on deal type.
automationTemplates.stepAssignCsmDesc: Assign a Customer Success Manager based on account segment.
automationTemplates.stepWelcomeCustomerDesc: Send a welcome email with onboarding guide and next steps.
automationTemplates.stepDealClosedTriggerDesc: Monitors closed deals and schedules survey delivery.
automationTemplates.stepWait30DaysDesc: Allow 30 days for the customer to experience the product.
automationTemplates.stepSendNpsSurveyDesc: Deliver an NPS survey via email to the primary contact.
automationTemplates.stepCheckNpsScoreDesc: Route promoters to marketing, detractors to customer success.
automationTemplates.stepCheck60DaysBeforeDesc: Identify contracts expiring within the next 60 days.
automationTemplates.stepNotifyAccountManagerDesc: Alert the account manager with renewal details and history.
automationTemplates.stepCreateRenewalTaskDesc: Generate a high-priority renewal task with contract details.
automationTemplates.stepHealthScoreDropDesc: Triggers when a customer health score drops below threshold.
automationTemplates.stepCheckChurnIndicatorsDesc: Analyze usage decline, ticket spikes, and engagement drops.
automationTemplates.stepEscalateToCsmDesc: Send urgent alert to the assigned Customer Success Manager.
automationTemplates.stepCreateRetentionPlanDesc: Auto-generate a retention action plan with recommended steps.
automationTemplates.stepNewTicketCreatedDesc: Triggers when a customer submits a new support ticket.
automationTemplates.stepCheckTicketCategoryDesc: Classify the ticket category to determine routing rules.
automationTemplates.stepAssignToAgentDesc: Route ticket to the best-matched agent based on skills and load.
automationTemplates.stepNotifyAgentDesc: Send instant notification to the assigned agent with ticket details.
automationTemplates.stepSlaTimerCheckDesc: Continuously monitors ticket age against SLA policy timers.
automationTemplates.stepCheckSlaBreachDesc: Evaluate if response or resolution time is approaching SLA limits.
automationTemplates.stepEscalateTicketDesc: Elevate ticket priority and reassign to senior agent or manager.
automationTemplates.stepNotifyManagerDesc: Alert support manager about the SLA breach or at-risk ticket.

automationTemplates.stepWait1HourDesc: Brief pause to ensure the resolution holds before surveying.
automationTemplates.stepSendCsatSurveyDesc: Deliver a short customer satisfaction survey via email.
